---
title: "Sarah Tanja"
image: images/kelp-queen.jpg
bibliography: about.bib
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: broadside # jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sarah-tanja-595722146/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/sarahtanja
    - icon: envelope-heart
      text: Email Me
      href: mailto::stanja@uw.edu
---
